prompt: A chic, high-contrast receipt from “Pâtisserie Étoile” in Paris, France. Font is elegant and printed in dark gray ink. Items: 1 Mille-feuille: €5.20, 1 Espresso: €2.30, 1 Macaron Box (6pcs): €11.00. TVA 10% included. Total: €18.50. The receipt has embossed logo at the top, and lies delicately beside a half-eaten dessert and a ceramic cup on a marble café table.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a chic, high-contrast receipt from 'Pâtisserie Étoile' in Paris, France. The receipt, printed in elegant dark gray font, displays an embossed logo at its top. It lists: '1 Mille-feuille: €5.20', '1 Espresso: €2.30', and '1 Macaron Box (6pcs): €11.00', clearly indicating 'TVA 10% included' and a 'Total: €18.50'. The receipt is delicately positioned on a polished marble café table, next to a half-eaten dessert and a white ceramic coffee cup.
